description_long: This is a multi-story Parisian-style apartment building with a steeply pitched, shingled mansard roof and numerous chimneys and rooftop details. The facade features tall, rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, with decorative stonework and cornices separating each floor. The lower level has large arched windows and a small protruding entrance, while the upper floors include a wraparound balcony with ornate railings. The building's exterior is primarily dark stone or brick, accented by lighter window frames and roof elements. The roof is adorned with several chimneys and vent pipes, adding to the historic European character. Overall, the structure exudes a classic, late 19th-century urban residential aesthetic.
description: A classic Parisian-style apartment building with a mansard roof, ornate balconies, and symmetrical window arrangements. The facade is dark stone with decorative details and multiple chimneys on the roof.
description_view_0: Front and left sides are visible, showing the main entrance, arched lower windows, and a prominent wraparound balcony.
description_view_1: Front and right sides are visible, highlighting the balcony's extension and the detailed roofline with chimneys.
description_view_2: Left side view, mostly flat wall with minimal window detail, emphasizing the building's depth and rooftop features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to view 2, showing a flat wall with little architectural detail and the rooftop elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with each floor featuring evenly spaced rectangular windows. The lower level has larger arched windows, while upper floors have smaller, regularly aligned windows.
